name: Potato Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 4 T oat flour (or powdered rolled oats)
4 T dried chopped onion (or 1/4 cup fresh onion)
pinch of salt and fresh ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the oat flour with enough water to form a pancake batter.
2. Add the onions, potatoes, salt, and pepper to the batter.
3. Spray a non-stick pan with Pam and place a paper towel underneath.
4. Spoon the batter into the pan to form 3 or 4 large pancakes.
5. Cook on medium heat until the bottom is golden brown with a few darker spots (about 2-3 minutes).
6. Carefully turn the pancakes over and cook the other side for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Serve with unsweetened natural applesauce.
Nutritional Information:
Each pancake (assuming four): Calories: 70.69, Fat 0.391 (5% of calories), Carbohydrate 15.06 g (83% of calories), Protein 2.155 g (12% of calories), Sodium 5.4 mg.
